## Summary

<!-- A short description of the proposed feature. -->

## Motivation

<!-- Why is this feature needed? What problem does it solve, or what use case does it enable? -->

## Proposed Solution

<!-- Describe the solution you'd like. Be as specific as possible. -->

## Affected Components

<!-- Which parts of the project would this feature touch? -->

- [ ] Solidity contracts (`contracts/`)
- [ ] Noir circuits (`noir/`)
- [ ] New ERC-8039 verifier adapter (which proof system: ___)
- [ ] Safe integration (`zksafe/`)
- [ ] Nexus integration (`zknexus/`)
- [ ] Deployment / tooling
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Other: ___

<!-- Describe any alternative solutions or features you've considered. -->

  - Proof generation workflow
  - On-chain verifier regeneration required?
